name: makeslide
description: PDF 語音簡報生成與播放系統 (M1)

scripts.build: scripts/with-node-env.sh npm --workspace backend run build && scripts/with-node-env.sh npm --workspace frontend run build
scripts.typecheck: scripts/with-node-env.sh npm --workspace backend run typecheck && scripts/with-node-env.sh npm --workspace frontend run typecheck
